title: Pichisermollia nigrovenia

This species is native to South America, specifically in the countries of French Guiana and possibly Brazil. As part of the Meliaceae family, Pichisermollia nigrovenia is related to other tropical and subtropical trees. The classification of Pichisermollia nigrovenia is an ongoing area of research in botany.
